what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment: an image asset in the design-assets channel, linking to a target image URI and recording an addition timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields
standouts: Target URI contains spaces and parentheses
concerns: Target URI includes unescaped spaces and parentheses, which may complicate parsing or linking
Lacks title, description, or MIME-type fields
notes: A bare ledger entry that indexes an image attachment in the design-assets channel.
questions: What does the target filename 'image (13)1' represent?
Is the image:// URI resolvable by consumers?
Who or what process added this attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches: it is a timestamped attachment metadata record.
intention_signals: Track when a specific image attachment was added to the design-assets channel and where it is located.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped identifier-to-location reference for a channel image attachment that a fused system can use for asset lookup.
summary_for_embedding: YAML metadata record for a design-assets channel image attachment pointing to image://design-assets/icons/image (13)1 and recording a 2026-06-22 addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment added to the design-assets channel on 2026-06-22.
